import copy

def summarize_config(config):
    config_copy = copy.deepcopy(config)
    return {
        "name": config_copy["name"],
        "version": config_copy["version"],
        "count": len(config_copy["items"]),
    }

def format_user_profile(user):
    user_copy = copy.deepcopy(user)
    return f"{user_copy['name']} ({user_copy['email']})"

def calculate_totals(items):
    items_copy = copy.deepcopy(items)
    return sum(item["price"] * item["qty"] for item in items_copy)
